ddls:
CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "theme_description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "theme_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the theme image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the theme was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the theme was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theme the topic belongs to */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "topic_tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of topic tags */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_followers" (
  "topic_follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic follower */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic being followed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is following the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user started following the topic */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last updated their follow status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_followers_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic the post belongs to */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the post */,
  "post_title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "post_content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "post_link" TEXT /* Link to the post on the forum */,
  "post_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the post image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_likes" (
  "post_like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post like */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the post being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who liked the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user liked the post */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last updated their like status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the post the comment belongs to */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the comment */,
  "comment_content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_comments_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, administrator) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the post the statistics belong to */,
  "time_interval" TEXT /* Time interval for the statistics (e.g., 20220629_022656, 20220629_040954) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the post at the given time interval */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies for the post at the given time interval */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistics were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_statistics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)
